writers.lyricist: John Dang/Rajan Singh Khanijaon/Christian F J Buettner
writers.composer: John Dang/Rajan Singh Khanijaon/Christian F J Buettner

lyrics.text: Here we stand, open arms
lyrics.translation: 敞开双臂怀抱这土地

lyrics.text: This is home where we are
lyrics.translation: 看家园沧海桑田永恒不变

lyrics.text: Ever strong in the world that we made
lyrics.translation: 浩荡世界中愈发坚强

lyrics.text: I still hear you in the breeze
lyrics.translation: 微风中残存着你的气息

lyrics.text: See your shadows in the trees
lyrics.translation: 树荫中模糊的你的身影

lyrics.text: Holding on, memories never change
lyrics.translation: 坚守这一切，人事变迁，记忆永不磨灭

lyrics.text: Summer in the hills
lyrics.translation: 山岗中度过的那个夏天

lyrics.text: Those hazy days I do remember
lyrics.translation: 水汽朦胧的景致犹依稀可见

lyrics.text: We were running still
lyrics.translation: 一路狂奔，我们从未停歇

lyrics.text: Had the whole world at our feet
lyrics.translation: 走遍这大千世界

lyrics.text: Watching seasons change
lyrics.translation: 坐观每一个寒来暑往

lyrics.text: Our roads were lined with adventure
lyrics.translation: 用一条条小径写下拼搏的曾经

lyrics.text: Mountains in the way
lyrics.translation: 一路崇山峻岭

lyrics.text: Couldn't keep us from the sea
lyrics.translation: 无法阻拦我们对大海的期望

lyrics.text: Here we stand open arms
lyrics.translation: 敞开双臂怀抱这土地

lyrics.text: This is home where we are
lyrics.translation: 看家园沧海桑田永恒不变

lyrics.text: Ever strong in the world that we made
lyrics.translation: 浩荡世界中愈发坚强

lyrics.text: I still hear you in the breeze
lyrics.translation: 微风中残存着你的气息

lyrics.text: See your shadows in the trees
lyrics.translation: 树荫中模糊的你的身影

lyrics.text: Holding on, memories never change
lyrics.translation: 坚守这一切，人事变迁，记忆永不磨灭
